steps.title: Set up
steps.content: The condition “not a motor neuron” restricts the sample space to Sensory and Interneurons only. From the table: Sensory total $= 13 + 9 + 3 = 25$; Interneuron total $= 10 + 29 + 0 = 39$. Restricted sample space $= 25 + 39 = 64$.

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: Count those with diameter ≤ 30 µm (the “Less than 20” and “20 to 30” columns): Sensory: $13 + 9 = 22$. Interneurons: $10 + 29 = 39$. Total favorable $= 22 + 39 = 61$. $$P(\text{diameter} \leq 30 \mid \text{not motor}) = \frac{61}{64} \approx 0.9531$$
